selected_tasks.body_preview: Ensure every ModelCallStarted event has a matching ModelCallCompleted, and every RunStarted has a matching RunCompleted, even on error/early-return paths. Why this matters: The harness trajectory shows: - model_incomplete/open_after_command=1 — ModelCallStarted recorded, tool completed, but ModelCallCompleted never emitted - state_incomplete/open_after_cache
selected_tasks.title: Close state lifecycle gaps — audit and fix ModelCallCompleted/RunCompleted emission

tasks.body_preview: Ensure every ModelCallStarted event has a matching ModelCallCompleted, and every RunStarted has a matching RunCompleted, even on error/early-return paths. tasks.title: Close state lifecycle gaps — audit and fix ModelCallCompleted/RunCompleted emission
